ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course this section belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the section is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the section is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of students allowed in this section */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Location of the class */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days on which the section is held */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the section is hybrid */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the section is fully online */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the section */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, waitlisted, dropped) */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., letter, pass/fail) */,
  "is_audit" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is auditing the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is international */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the department */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" TEXT /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Indicates if the prerequisite is mandatory or optional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prerequisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlist" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section for which the student is waitlisted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the student on the waitlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the waitlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the waitlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with this grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade awarded to the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., letter, pass/fail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the grade was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year as a string (e.g., 2017-2018) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the academic year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the academic year record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the semester is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the semester record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the semester record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)
